home.title:
The decentralized infrastructure
for stablecoin ecosystems
home.description: A revolutionary stablecoin protocol enabling trigger redemptions and enhanced stability. Use and build apps that leverage EVM as a secure base layer.
home.whyTectonicDesc: More flexibility, more composability, more security. Major upgrades across the entire Tectonic ecosystem.
home.futurePaymentsDesc: Tectonic is a fully collateralized stablecoin protocol built for the EVM ecosystem. By combining reserve-backed stability, equity participation, and automatic trigger redemptions, it provides a secure foundation for next-generation payment infrastructure.
home.liveOnLeadingChainsDesc: Tectonic is deployed across multiple EVM-compatible chains. Choose a deployment to explore, mint, and earn.
home.stabilityPaymentsTitle: Built for Stability. Made for Payments.
home.stabilityPaymentsDesc: Tectonic uses trigger redemptions to maintain high reserve ratios without ever disabling minting. This keeps stablecoins available when payments matter.
home.howItWorksDesc: The protocol flow is straightforward: deposit a native asset, mint a stablecoin, use or redeem it, and rely on automatic safety mechanisms to keep the reserve healthy.

1.title: Deposit Native Asset
1.desc: Users deposit the blockchain's native asset into the protocol.

2.title: Mint StableCoin
2.desc: The protocol issues stablecoins backed by the reserve.

3.title: Use or Redeem
3.desc: Users can use the stablecoins for payments or redeem them back for the reserve asset.

4.title: Automatic Safety Protection
4.desc: If reserve levels become unsafe, the protocol can trigger redemptions to restore the reserve ratio and maintain the peg.

home.joinCommunityDesc: Be part of the next generation of stablecoin infrastructure. Connect with builders, researchers, and enthusiasts.

triggerRedemptions.title: Trigger Redemptions
triggerRedemptions.desc: Unique mechanism ensuring protocol stability through automatic redemptions at predetermined rates.

secureBaseLayer.title: Secure Base Layer
secureBaseLayer.desc: Built on EVM with battle-tested security. Leverage blockchain's immutable infrastructure.

evmCompatible.title: EVM Compatible
evmCompatible.desc: Deploy on any EVM-compatible chain. Maximum interoperability and reach.

defiIntegration.title: DeFi Integration
defiIntegration.desc: Seamlessly integrate with existing DeFi protocols. Composable by design.

deploymentDetail.activeDesc: StableCoin holders can redeem 1:1 until the ratio recovers above 150%.
deploymentDetail.notActiveDesc: Reserve ratio is healthy. Normal operations running.
